error_signature: "Response Mode" in the chat trigger node must be set to "Using Response Nodes"
title: Chat trigger node response mode not set
symptom: When executing a workflow with a Chat trigger node, n8n throws an error indicating that the 'Response Mode' must be set to 'Using Response Nodes'. The setting is not visible in the node options.
not_this_if: Response Mode is already set correctly
root_cause: The Chat trigger node requires a specific configuration for the 'Response Mode' to function correctly. If this setting is not configured, the node cannot execute properly, leading to the error message.
fix_steps: Open the Chat trigger node settings
Navigate to options and add the field for 'Response Mode'
Select 'Using Response Nodes' from the dropdown
Save the workflow and try executing it again
agent_instruction: Set the 'Response Mode' in the Chat trigger node to 'Using Response Nodes' and save the workflow.
